metadata.purpose: Target architecture, compiler pipeline extensions, module contracts, and data flow for Bend integration

orchestrator.note: Returns TypeChecker instance. MIR and codegen share its TypeInterner.

stage.name: Lexer
stage.note: Add new tokens: fold, reduce, linear, unique, with, ask. Minimal changes.

stage.name: Parser
stage.note: Parse fold/reduce, comprehensions, with-blocks, linear annotations. Wrap recursion with stacker::maybe_grow.

stage.name: TypeChecker
stage.note: Type-check new constructs. Enforce linearity. Thread Diagnostics instead of early-exit.

stage.name: MIR Builder
stage.note: Lower new AST nodes. Add TensorOp variants for fused ops. Add ParallelRegion markers.

stage.name: MIR Transform Passes

passOrder.pass: Dead function elimination via call graph reachability
Constant folding for scalars and tensor shapes
Variable use-count analysis for zero-copy optimization
Extract closed tensor subexpressions to top-level functions
Pattern-match and fuse tensor operation chains
Inline trivial functions and single-use combinators
Build tensor DAG, identify independent subgraphs, annotate parallel regions

stage.orchestrator: PassManager runs passes in order, each receiving &mut MirProgram and &mut Diagnostics

stage.name: LLVM Codegen
stage.note: Emit fused kernel calls. Handle parallel region dispatch. Support --enum-layout.

stage.name: Clang Link
stage.note: Link with extended runtime containing fused kernels and thread pool.

crossCutting.module: Threaded through ALL stages T1-T7. Created at pipeline start, rendered at end.
Global. Available to all stages. Initialized before parsing.
Parsed from CLI flags. Passed to PassManager to toggle individual passes.

module.responsibility: Accumulative error/warning collection with configurable severity and grouped display
module.inputs: Diagnostic events from all compiler phases
module.outputs: Grouped, ANSI-colored diagnostic output; fatal() checkpoint results
module.contract: Never panics. fatal() returns Err only if errors accumulated. Thread-safe if needed.
module.keyTypes: Diagnostics, Diagnostic, Severity, DiagnosticConfig, DiagnosticCategory, Phase

module.responsibility: PassManager orchestrating ordered MIR transformation passes
module.inputs: Raw MIR from TAST lowering, OptimizationConfig
module.outputs: Optimized MIR ready for LLVM codegen
module.contract: Each pass receives &mut MirProgram and &mut Diagnostics. Passes are independent. Order fixed in PassManager. Individual passes skippable via config.

module.responsibility: Dead function elimination via call graph reachability from main
module.algorithm: Build call graph from MIR. BFS/DFS from main. Remove unreachable functions. Warn for non-builtin unreachable.

module.responsibility: Constant folding for scalar arithmetic and tensor shape expressions
module.algorithm: Walk MIR statements. If binary op on two constants, evaluate at compile time. Propagate through assignments.

module.responsibility: Pattern-match tensor operation sequences and replace with fused kernel calls
module.contract: Fused ops MUST be numerically equivalent (epsilon < 1e-6). Must not fuse across control flow. Must not fuse side-effecting ops.

fusionPatterns.pattern: N consecutive element-wise ops on same shape → single-pass kernel

module.responsibility: Build DAG of tensor operations, identify independent subgraphs, emit parallel dispatch
module.contract: Only parallelize pure operations (no side effects, no shared mutable state). Parallel results MUST equal sequential.
module.algorithm: Build DAG: nodes = tensor ops, edges = data deps. Topological sort. Identify width-2+ levels. Annotate with ParallelRegion.

module.responsibility: Extract closed tensor subexpressions to top-level functions
module.algorithm: Walk MIR. For each tensor op sequence with no free non-tensor variables, extract to new function. Name: {parent}__K{N}.

module.responsibility: Inline trivial functions (single basic block, no loops, small body) and single-use extracted combinators
Analyze variable usage counts for zero-copy optimization
module.algorithm: Walk MIR. Count uses per variable. 0 uses → mark for erasure. 1 use → mark zero-copy eligible. N uses → mark for explicit clone. Linear-annotated params: enforce exactly-1-use.

module.responsibility: Global string interning for all identifiers
module.contract: Thread-safe arena. O(1) comparison via pointer equality. All Name values are interned. Coexists with TypeInterner.

module.changes: Add tokens: Fold, Reduce, Linear, Unique, With, Ask. Add For (comprehension context). Update keyword lookup.
Parse fold/reduce, comprehensions, with-blocks, linear annotations. Wrap recursive calls with stacker::maybe_grow.
Add: FoldExpr, ReduceExpr, Comprehension, WithBlock, AskExpr, LinearParam. Extend FnParam with linearity flag.
Type-check fold (accumulator inference), reduce (element type), with-blocks (bind chain), linearity (single-use). Thread Diagnostics.
Lower new AST nodes. Add TensorOp::Fused* variants. Add ParallelRegion. Integrate PassManager call.
Add fused kernels: axon_fused_linear_relu, axon_fused_mse, axon_fused_softmax_ce, axon_fused_elementwise. Add thread pool: axon_parallel_dispatch, axon_parallel_join.
Emit fused kernel calls. Handle ParallelRegion → thread pool dispatch. Support --enum-layout tagged|packed|scattered.
Integrate linearity checking: linear-annotated parameters must be used exactly once.
Wire Diagnostics through all phases. Integrate PassManager between MIR build and codegen. Parse OptimizationConfig from CLI.
Add: stacker = "0.1", insta = "1.34" (dev-dep). Ensure no version conflicts.

contract.name: DiagnosticsFlow
contract.description: Diagnostics collector created at pipeline start, threaded through every phase, rendered at pipeline end.
contract.invariant: No phase may render diagnostics independently. Only the pipeline orchestrator renders.
fatal() checkpoints at phase boundaries: after parsing, after type checking, after MIR optimization.
Diagnostics survive across phase boundaries — errors from parsing are visible alongside type errors.

contract.name: MirPassChain
contract.description: MIR passes execute in fixed order. Each pass receives valid MIR, must produce valid MIR.
contract.invariant: Pass order: dead_code → const_fold → linearize → float_combinators → fuse_ops → inline → parallelize.
Passes individually toggleable via CLI without breaking chain.
Disabled pass is simply skipped — no stub needed.

contract.name: FusionCorrectness
contract.description: Fused operations must produce identical results to unfused sequences.
contract.invariant: Numerical equivalence: epsilon < 1e-6 for all fusion patterns.
Fusion must not cross control flow boundaries.
Fusion must not reorder side-effecting operations.

contract.name: ParallelismSafety
contract.description: Auto-parallelization must never change program semantics.
contract.invariant: Only pure tensor ops with no shared mutable state may be parallelized.
Side-effecting ops (print, file IO, RNG) are NEVER parallelized.
Parallel results must match sequential results within floating-point epsilon (< 1e-6). Bit-identical results are not required because parallel reduction changes floating-point evaluation order.

contract.name: InternerConsistency
contract.description: NameInterner and TypeInterner coexist without interference.
contract.invariant: NameInterner handles identifiers (variable, function, module names).
TypeInterner handles type representations (unchanged from current).
Neither interner references the other's data.

contract.name: LinearityEnforcement
contract.description: Linear-annotated parameters are used exactly once.
contract.invariant: Zero uses → compile error (unused linear parameter).
Multiple uses → compile error (linear parameter used more than once).
Non-linear parameters → existing borrow checker rules apply (unchanged).

machine.name: CompilationPipeline
machine.states: Init → Lexing → Parsing → TypeChecking → MirBuilding → MirOptimizing → Codegen → Linking → Done | Failed

layer.name: unit
layer.requirement: Every new module must have >= 10 unit tests.
Tests cover normal case, edge cases, and error cases.

layer.name: integration
layer.requirement: Cross-module tests for each new feature.
Full pipeline tests (source → binary → run → verify output).

layer.name: snapshot
layer.categories: parse, typecheck, mir, llvm_ir, errors, fusion
layer.tool: cargo-insta with cargo insta test / cargo insta review workflow.

layer.name: benchmark
layer.requirement: Criterion benchmarks for fusion throughput and parallel scaling.
layer.metrics: ops/sec, memory bandwidth utilization, scaling factor

layer.name: e2e
layer.requirement: .axon files that compile, run, and verify output.
At least one e2e test per major new feature.
